output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winner ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q219126 wdt:P361 ?event .
  ?event rdfs:label ?eventLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventLabel) = "en" && ?eventLabel = "Men's singles" @en)
  ?event wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?eventDate .
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY DESC(?eventDate)
LIMIT 1

} ORDER BY DESC(?eventDate) LIMIT 1
